title: Get the members of a BC
content:
Use this endpoint to get members in a Business Center. You need to be an Admin of the Business Center. If you need to get assets for a member, use the [/bc/asset/get/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739432717798401) endpoint. You need to pass in either `user_id` or `user_email`. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/bc/member/get/| /v1.3/bc/member/get/| |Request parameter data type|`bc_id`: number |`bc_id`: string | |Response parameter data type|`user_id`: number |`user_id`: string | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/member/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token{Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required} | string | Business Center ID | |page| number| Current page. | |page_size| number| Page size. The maximum page size is 20. | |filtering |object| Filtering conditions| #| keyword | string | Keyword to filter by | #| user_role | string | Basic roles within Business Center. Enum values:
  • `ADMIN`: Admins can manage the Business Center's members and assets.
  • `STANDARD`: Standard members can only work on the ad accounts they've been assigned to. | #| relation_status | string | User's relation to the Business Center. If the invitation to join the Business Center is still pending, or has been accepted. Enum values:
    • `BOUND`: The request to manage the asset has been approved by the owner.
    • `PENDING`: The request to manage the asset is pending on the owner's approval.
    • `REJECTED`: The request to manage the asset has been rejected by the owner.
    | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --get -H "Access-Token:xxx" \ --data-urlencode "bc_id=BC_ID" \ --data-urlencode "page=PAGE" \ --data-urlencode "page_size=PAGE_SIZE" \ --data-urlencode "filtering={\"keyword\": \"KEYWORD\", \"user_role\": \"USER_ROLE\", \"relation_status\": \"RELATION_STATUS\"}" \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/member/get/ (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number | Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string | Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object| Returned data. | #|list|object[]|Member information.| ##| user_id | string | User ID. | ##| user_name | string | User name. | ##| user_role | string | Basic roles within Business Center.| ##| relation_status | string | User's relation to the Business Center. If the invitation to join the Business Center is still pending, or has been accepted. | ##| user_email | string | User email address.

    Note:

    • To protect the personal information of members, some email addresses are masked by default. For instance, an email address of `user@example.com` will be returned as `u**r@example.com`. You can apply for an allowlist to access the unmasked email addresses of all members.
    • Accessing unmasked email addresses of all members within your Business Center is currently an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative.
    | ##| ext_user_role | object | Advanced role of the user in the Business Center other than basic role. | ###| finance_role | string | User finance role. Enum values: `MANAGER`, `ANALYST`. | #|page_info|object|Pagination information. | ##|total_number|number|Total number of results. | ##|total_page|number|Total pages of results. | ##|page_size|number|Page size. | ##|page|number|Current page number. | |request_id|string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "list": [ { "user_id": null, "ext_user_role": { "finance_role": null }, "relation_status": "BOUND", "user_name": null, "user_role": "ADMIN", "user_email": "{{user_email}}" }, { "user_id": null, "ext_user_role": { "finance_role": null }, "relation_status": "PENDING", "user_name": null, "user_role": "STANDARD", "user_email": "{{user_email}}" } ], "page_info": { "total_number": 2, "page": 1, "page_size": 20, "total_page": 1 } } } (/code) ```
